description: An arg type mod pack that features many aspects to give an "old" feeling, with some special horrors :)
body:
In 2009, there exist a version of Minecraft lost to time, it was unknown what was in these versions. Some say there is features of new minecraft, giving the theory that they reused assets from this lost version and repairing the "bugs" with the entities. However, a leaked build of it has spread around. But, something doesnt seem right with this version of minecraft.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UK0L0tU6I0w" title="Trailer" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

when we seek we always find

Heavily based off TBS and other ARG aspects. 
Inspired by Nick's Subwoofer Lullaby (featured in the trailer)
